description: Characters who wield or study magic.
characters: Wizard
A learned spellcaster who bends reality through study and will.
Witch
A practitioner of old magic, feared and respected in equal measure.
Sorcerer
A wielder of raw magical power drawn from within.
Enchantress
A spellweaver whose magic charms and beguiles.
Druid
A keeper of nature's balance who draws power from the living world.
Alchemist
A bubbling-flask experimenter who transforms one substance into another.
Warlock
A spellcaster who draws power from a pact with something greater.
Seer
A visionary who glimpses what has not yet come to pass.
Shaman
A spirit-speaker who bridges the seen and unseen worlds.
Enchanter
A craftsperson who weaves magic into objects and places.
Summoner
A caller of creatures from other planes and realms.
Illusionist
A trickster who makes the unreal seem perfectly real.
Conjurer
A spellcaster who pulls something from nothing.
Runesmith
A carver of magical symbols that hold power in their lines.
Diviner
A reader of signs, stars, and hidden patterns.
Herbalist
A gatherer and mixer of plants with hidden properties.
Apothecary
A maker of remedies, tonics, and subtle poisons.
